description: A customized yellow auto-rickshaw with neon underglow drifting through the narrow, rain-slicked streets of Mumbai at midnight, pursued by two sleek corporate security bikes.
style: Cinematic action, gritty hyperrealism, Neo-Noir aesthetic.
camera: Low-angle tracking shot, fast-paced following the rickshaw's wheel; sudden whip-pan to the chasing bikes.
lens: 24mm Wide-Angle, deep focus on the rickshaw with motion blur on the background buildings.
lighting: Intermittent flashes of blue and red police lights, reflected on wet asphalt; golden-yellow light from the rickshaw's headlamp.
environment: Mumbai street with crowded market stalls, hanging wires, and tall neon-lit signs in Marathi; heavy rain creating puddles and mist.
audio: High-pitched whine of electric bikes, the roar of the rickshaw engine, screeching tires on wet metal, heavy rainfall, and energetic percussion.
motion: Rickshaw hydroplaning slightly during the drift; sparks flying as the metal bumper scrapes a street post; rain whipping horizontally across the frame.
ending: The rickshaw disappears into a wall of thick steam rising from a sewer grate; camera stays on the steam as the red tail-lights fade.
